summary: Iteration 35 - Form Completion Tracking System Testing COMPLETE. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All visual elements verified. The /api/field-agent/my-farmers endpoint correctly returns forms_status (ICI, SSRTE, Parcelles, Photos, Enregistrement) and completion (completed, total, percentage) for each farmer. UI shows progress bars, completion percentages, 'Complete' badges with checkmark icons for completed forms, and circle icons for incomplete forms.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend forms_status correctly queries ici_profiles, ssrte_visits, parcels, geotagged_photos collections to determine completion status
Completion percentage calculation is accurate: completed_count / total_forms * 100
Frontend farmer cards correctly display progress bars with color coding (emerald/amber/gray based on percentage)
Farmer profile correctly shows global progress bar with percentage and x/5 fiches complétées
Completed forms display green background/border, 'Complete' badge, and CheckCircle2 icon
Non-completed forms display standard colors and Circle icon
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Existing: Balde ibo (ICI + Register = 40%), Koffi (Register only = 20%)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35 verified the Form Completion Tracking feature. Backend API returns forms_status object with 5 forms: ici (Visite ICI), ssrte (Visite SSRTE), parcels (Parcelles), photos (Photos), register (Enregistrement). Each form has completed (bool) and label (string). ssrte, parcels, photos also have count (int). completion object contains completed (int), total (int), percentage (int). Frontend shows: Farmer list with progress bars and percentages. Farmer profile with global progress bar and per-form badges. Completed forms: green bg, 'Complete' badge, checkmark icon. Non-completed: standard colors, circle icon.
mocked_api_note: Orange Money, Orange SMS, USSD Gateway are MOCKED as per original requirements. Form completion tracking uses real MongoDB data.
